headline: Shifting to AI model customization is an architectural imperative
desc: In the early days of large language models (LLMs), we grew accustomed to massive 10x jumps in reasoning and coding capability with every new model iteration. Today, those jumps have flattened into incremental gains. The exception is domain-specialized intelligence, where true step-function improvements are still the norm. When a model is fused with an organization’s…

headline: Anthropic is having a moment in the private markets; SpaceX could spoil the party
desc: Glen Anderson, president of Rainmaker Securities, says the secondary market for private shares has never been more active — with Anthropic the hottest trade around, OpenAI losing ground, and SpaceX's looming IPO poised to reshape the landscape for everyone.

headline: Anthropic buys biotech startup Coefficient Bio in $400M deal: Reports
desc: Anthropic has purchased the stealth biotech AI startup Coefficient Bio in a $400 million stock deal, according to The Information and Eric Newcomer.

headline: OpenAI executive shuffle includes new role for COO Brad Lightcap to lead ‘special projects’
desc: In addition to Lightcap's new role, OpenAI CMO Kate Rouch will be stepping away from the company to focus on cancer recovery, with a plan to return when her health allows.

headline: Anthropic ramps up its political activities with a new PAC
desc: With the midterms right around the corner, the new group is positioned to back candidates who support the AI company's policy agenda.
